audit_metadata.skip_reason: x-verified-by claude-bib-audit-2026-05 or gemini-* stamp present

entries.notes: OpenAI blog post 'AI and Compute' by Amodei and Hernandez. URL https://openai.com/research/ai-and-compute resolves correctly. Existing x-verified-by 'bib-web-verify' from 2026-04-26.
3rd edition of 'The Datacenter as a Computer', published 2018 by Morgan & Claypool Publishers. Confirmed Hardcover ISBN exists. Authors and edition correct.

Confirmed: Isaev/McDonald/Dennison/Vuduc, SC23. DOI 10.1145/3581784.3607102 resolves to ACM. Suggested addition of pages: '20:1--20:13' (article 20, 13 pages) but not strictly required since DOI is canonical.

JMLR vol 24(240), pp 1-113, 2023 publication date matches. URL https://jmlr.org/papers/v24/22-1144.html resolves. Note the key says '2022' (preprint year) but year field is '2023' (publication year) - this is the 1-year preprint-vs-publication gap allowed by §5 rules.
Future Generation Computer Systems vol 22(3), pp 303-312, DOI 10.1016/j.future.2004.11.016 resolves correctly.
NeurIPS 2022, authors verified. Missing pages (16344-16359 per published version). Should add pages.

suggested_fix.add_publisher_correction: Curran Associates (already present, slight punctuation: 'Curran Associates Inc.' is fine)

entries.notes: INCORRECT TYPE: This is a NeurIPS 2012 conference paper, not a journal article. Currently typed @article with journal='Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems' which is the conference proceedings, not a journal. Should be @inproceedings with booktitle='Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)' per §2 venue expansion rule. Also missing pages (1223-1231 or 1232-1240 per DBLP).

suggested_fix.add_field_booktitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)

entries.notes: Communications of the ACM vol 56(2), pp 74-80, DOI 10.1145/2408776.2408794 verified.

NSDI'22 paper verified, USENIX Association publisher correct. Missing pages (929-943 per USENIX proceedings). Booktitle is verbose 'Proceedings of the 19th USENIX Symposium on Networked Systems Design and Implementation (NSDI)' which is acceptable.

arXiv preprint 2103.13630, well-known survey. Per §4 'Entries without natural page numbers (arXiv preprints, blog posts, webpages) are exempt' from page number requirement. Acceptable as preprint citation.

arXiv 1510.00149 was published at ICLR 2016 (best paper award). Currently cited as arXiv preprint. Could be upgraded to ICLR 2016 publication (year 2016, key drift). Acceptable as preprint per §4 exemption, but ICLR version would be more authoritative.

suggested_fix.rename_note: Renaming requires updating every [@han2015deep] reference in associated source files. Current key with 2015 (preprint year) and year=2015 is internally consistent.

entries.notes: 6th edition of Computer Architecture: A Quantitative Approach, Morgan Kaufmann 2019. ISBN 978-0128119051 verified.
arXiv 2203.15556 was presented at NeurIPS 2022. Currently arXiv preprint. Page-number exempt per §4. Acceptable as preprint, but NeurIPS version would be more authoritative.
ISCA 2017, DOI 10.1145/3079856.3080246, pages 1-12, ACM publisher all confirmed.
arXiv preprint 2001.08361, never formally published in venue. Page-number exempt per §4.
SOSP 2023, DOI 10.1145/3600006.3613165, ACM publisher correct. Missing pages but DOI is canonical per §4.
IEEE Transactions on Computers C-34(10), pp 892-901, 1985. DOI 10.1109/TC.1985.6312192 verified.
ICML 2023 PMLR vol 202. Booktitle is correct expansion. Has URL to arXiv but missing pages (19274-19286 per PMLR).
Operations Research 9(3), pp 383-387, 1961. DOI 10.1287/opre.9.3.383 verified.
IEEE Micro 40(2), pp 8-16, DOI 10.1109/MM.2020.2974843 verified.

Self-reference to the curriculum's own book. Year 2025 is forward-dated as of 2026-05-03 (book is published). URL https://mlsysbook.ai resolves. Acceptable as project self-reference; first-author corporate-style key (project name 'mlsysbook') so per §5 first-author looks corporate / project — surname mismatch with 'Reddi' is intentional.
PVLDB Vol 14(5), pp 771-784, 2021. URL to vldb.org PDF resolves. Could add DOI 10.14778/3446095.3446100.

INCORRECT TYPE/VENUE: Currently @inproceedings with booktitle='VLDB Endowment'. Actually a journal article in PVLDB Vol 14, Issue 12, pages 2945-2958. Should be @article with journal='Proceedings of the {VLDB} Endowment' (PVLDB is treated as a journal). Existing source URL points to the right paper (Klimovic-named PDF is the correct one - VLDB hosts under last-author-named files for some reason). Year and authors correct.
SC'21 paper, DOI 10.1145/3458817.3476209, ACM publisher correct.
NVIDIA H100 datasheet reference. URL to nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/h100/ resolves.
ISPASS 2019, DOI 10.1109/ISPASS.2019.00042, IEEE publisher correct. Missing pages (304-315).
ISCA 2024, DOI 10.1109/ISCA59077.2024.00019, IEEE publisher correct. Missing pages (118-132).

MLSys 2023, vol 5. URL to proceedings.mlsys.org resolves. Publisher 'mlsys.org' is acceptable. Could be expanded to 'Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems (MLSys)' but venue already shows this expansion.
SC'20, DOI 10.1109/SC41405.2020.00024, IEEE publisher correct. 16-page article 20.

KDD'20 tutorial, DOI 10.1145/3394486.3406703, ACM publisher correct. Missing pages (3505-3506). Booktitle could be expanded to 'Proceedings of the 26th ACM SIGKDD International Conference on Knowledge Discovery & Data Mining (KDD)'.
arXiv 1701.06538 was presented at ICLR 2017. Currently arXiv preprint. Page-number exempt per §4. Acceptable as preprint, but ICLR version would be more authoritative.
arXiv 1909.08053 was never formally published in a peer-reviewed venue (despite many citations). Acceptable as arXiv preprint. Page-number exempt per §4.
ICLR 2025 oral, OpenReview URL verified. Note 'Oral presentation. arXiv:2408.03314' is appropriate.

Communications of the ACM 17(9), pp 530-531, 1974. DOI 10.1145/361147.361115 verified.

arXiv 2312.07104. Note 'Introduces RadixAttention for automatic prompt caching via prefix tree matching' is descriptive. Note: The paper has since been published at NeurIPS 2024; arXiv version is acceptable per §4 preprint exemption. Authors and topic correct.

top_3_broken.issue: Wrong entry type: should be @inproceedings (NeurIPS 2012 conference paper), not @article. Currently uses 'journal=Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems' which is actually the conference proceedings name. Missing pages (1223-1231).

Wrong entry type: should be @article in PVLDB journal (Proceedings of the VLDB Endowment vol 14, issue 12, pp 2945-2958), not @inproceedings with booktitle='VLDB Endowment'. PVLDB is conventionally treated as a journal. Missing DOI 10.14778/3476311.3476374 and pages.

Self-reference to the curriculum's own book; year 2025 is now past. Status uncertain rather than broken — acceptable as project self-reference, but worth noting that the book's publication status should be reflected accurately (publisher 'Harvard University' may need updating to 'MIT Press' if MIT Press is the actual publisher post-copyedit).
